name: Downtown Yacht
description: WHY CAN'T YOU OWN A YACHT? SAY NO MORE! Located in the Downtown area of City Center enjoy your Brand-New FULLY KITTED Yacht. I decorated the Interior with Drinks, Trinkets, TVs, Stripper Poles and in the back of the Yacht I added a Gated Hot tub and an area with Tables, Chairs, and a Grill!
